title: Headcount
intro: Add everyone whose wages are a cost — whether or not they log in. A branch-only mechanic is 100% one site; a master tech shared across branches is split (e.g. 60% / 40%). Percentages must total 100%.
emptySite: No one allocated to this site yet.
name: Name
allocationHint: Split this cost across the sites that bear it. Must total 100%.

shape.heading: Employment shape (capacity)
shape.chargeableHint: Counts toward labour utilisation — hours available. Nothing to do with permissions.
shape.inherits: Inherits the site’s opening days ({{days}}). Pick days to set an explicit pattern.
shape.clearOverride: Clear override — inherit site opening days
